posts.author: anupammahor
posts.community: Marine Electricals: Riding the Waves of Expansion
posts.text: The order book stood at 525 crore as of March 2025 and increased to 1,254 crore as of March 2026. Since then, the company has received additional orders worth 700 crore. Securing 700 crore of orders in just three months is quite significant.
